AC: 12
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +9
WT: 5.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR CLR PAL RNG SHD DRU BRD ROG SHM
Race: ALL

Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: SECONDARY
AC: 12
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.

WT: 5.0 Size: MEDIUM

Race: ALL

Light:Flameless Lantern

Expansion: Original
Average Price: 900pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 20
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Highpass Hold
NPC Name
Vexven Mucktail - Highpass Hold


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Highpass Hold


Uploaded September 23rd, 2018 by Drewinette

Post Comment
Nope
QuoteReply
# Aug 08 2002 at 12:36 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1593362230270
93 posts
The shield does not drop in EK. There are 2 vexven muktails and the one in HH drops the shield.
▲ Page top
Cracked Darkwood Shield
QuoteReply
# Jun 26 2002 at 12:19 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591779198481
5 posts
There may be an easier way to get the shield and the tomahawk instead of sitting in Highpass Hold camped out for hours. As you leave Highpass Hold down to Eastern Karana, there is a rather long road that winds through the mountains and empties out on to the Plains of Eastern Karana. As soon as road ends and it levels out on to the plains, to the left there are some low hills. On those hills I've seen Grenix and Vexven (plus the gnoll chieftain and other named Mucktail gnolls) just sitting there minding there business. Every time I've gone through there (and I do mean every single time) on my way to HighPass, I check my track (I'm a ranger) and yep, there they are. No one is ever camped out in this spot. I don't think anyone realizes that Grenix (PGT) and Vexven (CDS) spawn there at the same time. But I've never gone to kill them to see if they'll drop the loot like they do up in Highpass. Maybe they do, maybe they don't. I'll give it a try and post the results soon.
▲ Page top
Cracked Darkwood Shield
QuoteReply
# Feb 14 2021 at 6:18 PM Rating: Decent
animekenji
1,123 posts
The ones in EK are different mobs despite having the same name. They also spawn with lower levels there. It would be too easy for people to get the PGT and CDS if they dropped them there. The weapon and shield are meant to be rare items, not common ones.
____________________________
If you were me and I were you, would we still be friends?
▲ Page top
RE: Cracked Darkwood Shield
QuoteReply
# Oct 08 2002 at 9:21 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592247179407
View User Forum
Scholar
155 posts
Having spent a lot of time in younger days trying to get both the PGT and CDS in Highpass AND spending a lot of time in my older days in EK while spider hunting, I can say this:

1)Vexven and Grenix Mucktail DO spawn in Highpass. They are rare spawns at the Gnoll Ledge area. When you kill they they will drop the CDS and PGT respectively.

2)Vexven and Grenix Mucktail DO spawn in East Karana as well. They are found with the other Mucktail gnolls to your left as you walk down the ramp from Highhold just after you leave the ramp. I have killed them each here roughly 100 times each and they have never dropped anything other than the minor coin that all the other Mucktails drop.

3)There was a rumor that the EK ones were connected with the spawn of the ones in Highhold. The rumor being that when you killed the ones in EK, they would spawn the ones at the Gnoll Ledge in Highhold. This is false. I have had a ranger friend who was in the Gnoll Group in Highhold at the gnoll ledge and killed 5 of each of them in East Karana. None of the times did the Highhold version pop. The same ranger was in EK one time spider hunting and I was passing though an unpopulated Highhold and ran into Grenix. Sent him a tell to check track for Grenix there and he was indeed spawned in both places.

Just a little of what I have learned for what it is worth=)

▲ Page top
CDS
QuoteReply
# May 19 2002 at 12:08 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591749847760
29 posts
Camped the Gnoll ledge this weekend solo for the first time. Was told named gnolls popped on the jutting out peak between the ramp up to the ledge and the bridge over to Cpt. O. Camped for two hours and got no named gnolls. Then Vexven came up and hit me from behind. He was easy kill for my 29 Pally who really needed a CDS. Worthwhile camp for an untwinked 20's level fighter who needs an upgrade from the Shiny Brass Shield. CDS does bash to stop casters and stun runners just like SBS.

Ceefour Fusee
29 th. season Pally from Bristlebane
▲ Page top
LUCKY!!!
QuoteReply
# Apr 12 2002 at 6:07 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591777583811
15 posts
At the level of 18 I was more than lucky to get this shield. Along for the ride was a lvl 18 High Elf Mage, A level 14 Vah Shir Warrior, a Lvl 13 Half Elf bard, and myself a lvl 18 Ranger (Wood Elf) of course. We originally camped the spot to get the ax dropped by the Vexvan's comrade. After a few hours of fighting gnolls for exp our warrior and bard had this great ax. Before you know it we start getting mauled and out of nowhere Vexvin shows up. At 18 he stilled con'd red to me. The bard and myself hacked away at Vexvin while our warrior took care of the smaller gnoll trash. Then all three of us started hacking away at him while our mage nuked him. Before you know it the warrior and I are running after him. I got the loot and sure enough there was a CDS. A big improvment from my shiny brass shield I had at the time. All in all we were very lucky that night. When all was said and done our Bard and Warrior level'd and everyone except for our mage had the great hatchet perfect for our late teen charachters.
▲ Page top
Cracked Darkwood Shield
QuoteReply
# Mar 24 2002 at 7:27 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591775794987
1 post
This shield is worth the effort for those that aren't twinked or high lvl. The only problem is that this is a very rare spawn and totally random. I camped this spot by myself, which is possible, and ran into him only twice in those 5 days. I'm sure he spawns at least once a day because I killed his brother Grenix Mucktail at least 6 times before I got Vexven. There is a problem here with KS'ing. It's a very small zone and only two places to camp: Orcs and Gnolls. All I can say is if you really want it you'll get. You'll just have to work for it.
▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# Feb 12 2002 at 5:54 PM Rating: Decent

This item doesnt drop in Old Sebilis someone placed it on a monster there for kicks.
Highpass and the karanas is it for where it drops at.

For those of you thinking of buying this shield for your Beastlord, save your PP for something else as it is not usable by this class

To answer you qeuestion...Yes it will bash the creatures that were INVULNERABLE to you up to this point.

shield bash
QuoteReply
# Oct 28 2001 at 6:26 PM Rating: Decent

Scholar
60 posts
Does anyone know if this shield makes Paladin's shield bash into a magical attack so that it is effective against ghouls and other 'magic attack only' creatures????
▲ Page top
RE: shield bash
QuoteReply
# Jan 12 2002 at 5:43 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591770221274
11 posts
I have been using this shield since lvl 30. Its a good midrange shield at an affordable price or camp whichever. I have bashed much with it. To my knowledge it has no "magical" attributes for bashing. It will however interrupt many MoB's spell casting when using it to bash during a MoB's spell. My bash is maxed at my lvl and does anywher between 5 and 15 pts of dmg on a MoB. BTW...i'm selling this shield on Rodcet Nife..as I just got my Trueheart Shield from the Plane of Hate and no longer need it.
▲ Page top
An Iksar SK
QuoteReply
# Aug 14 2001 at 9:50 AM Rating: Decent
Darknyss
Scholar
551 posts
as an Iksar SK, shields are important when training both slashing skills... I am probably going to camp this item, and I think my lvl 31 HT will more than likely take away any KSing (and unfortunately any other low lvl group hoping for this item)... I was wondering if there was a better shield for my lvl/class/race rather than hunting this Mucktail and probably getting /tell spammed with a bunch of noobs saying I KS'ed them
____________________________
Pain Lord Darknyss Grimscale
92 Iksar Crusader of the Greenmist

QuoteReply
# Aug 14 2001 at 8:21 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591752043081
82 posts
Well my 45 SK is using one so not really. The Clay Guardian Shield is +25 AC +50hps, goes for 1.5 to 3K maybe. So if you want a nice shield that you can camp easy then this one will work. And as a DE I need the +9 Str.
▲ Page top
Got a CDS and wat to sell
QuoteReply
# Aug 12 2001 at 3:52 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250278595
7 posts
I joined a iksar monk lvl 20 and started killing gnolls, after the third kill Vexven popped. We killed him (he was yellow to him and red to me) and he dropped the CDS and we rolled.
The monk won the roll but sold the shield to me for 100pp. I asked him if he was sure and he said he was to impatient to wait till someone buys it. Later that day i was leaving gnoll ledge and bumped into a nother lvl 35 iksar monk who gave to me a PGT for free!

I want to sell the CDS for 140pp, send me a tell if interested. Stats are +9str 12ac.

Dragoonmarfet
Vazaelle Server
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jul 23 2001 at 9:18 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) How much are u willing ot sell it for? Send me a tell on Razorfists, Taluvill, Wulvaren, or Hendil.
I got one last night
QuoteReply
# Jun 26 2001 at 9:47 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361334891
4 posts
Last night, I was camping with two others (Warrior, Enchanter, and I'm a cleric). He spawned and was suprisingly easy to kill. I barely didn't even have to heal the warrior, and we were only level 16-18 at the time. He dropped a CDS, and I got it because they already had one.
▲ Page top
Doesn't spawn alone
QuoteReply
# Jun 23 2001 at 5:49 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I camped Vexven for two nights in a row, and both times he popped, about 30 seconds later two other gnolls popped with him (The first time it was two flamepaws, the second time, two brawlers). In Highpass he conned yellow to me at 21 both times, but I did see him once in EK, and he conned green to me there, but didn't drop anything when I killed him.

Its that rare?

# Jun 18 2001 at 1:46 AM Rating: Default

Wow... I looted one when i killed the named gnoll as I was running through highpass to check out what was new in Runnyeye after that patch. After I satisfied myself on killing alot of gobs, I zoned back through to bank in highkeep and killed the named again and yet another shield... Since they are lore I let someone else loot it.
*shrug*

Been working over gnolls for a week
QuoteReply
# Jun 08 2001 at 2:08 AM Rating: Decent

View User Forum
9 posts
I've been grouped on the gnoll ledge in HH for a week now. I did win the PGT from Grenix Mucktail that spawns there (won roll in group), but have yet to see the CDS or Vexven come up.

In the description at the top this says that the CDS also drops off of Vexven Mucktail in EK, but I have not found that to be the case as of yet. I've killed all of the named gnolls that spawn in EK several times, but have yet to get a decent drop from any of them.

On Xev, there are hardly any KS'ing in the Pass, I went from 16 to 20 without one incidence. I saw the shield twice, first a Monk won it ( I know! ) then the second time I won it.

Great for Paladins who raise 1HS and 2HS, as we cant Duel Weild and most of the races need the added strength ( Half Elf here )

Good luck camping him, good group late teens should do the trick.

Was in group of six. I rolled the highest and got the shield its great and it is a light source. Enough said.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: May 17 2001 at 11:47 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) FOR THOSE OF U HOW HAVE EXPERINCED A KS READ YOUR GUID BOOK AND USE IT TO MAKE THE GM'S DO THERE JOBS ON PAG 118 IN THE OLD BOOK AND PAGE 239 IN THE NEW ONE IT SAYS IN BLACK AND WITE THAT IF U R CAMPING A SPAWN SITE ALL SPAWNS ARE YOURS AND NO OTHERS MAY ATTACK FROM THAT SITE UNLESS U GIVE PERMISSION. NOW IF U CONTACT A GM AND REMIND HIM OF THE RULES IF HE DOSENT WANT TO HELP WHICH I HAVE AND HE DID CHANGE HIS MIND U WELL FIND THAT OTHERES WELL LEAVE U ALONE AND THE GM'S WELL DO WHAT IS RIGHT WHICH MAKES THE GAME A BETTER PLACE TO PLAY
RE: KSING
QuoteReply
# May 24 2001 at 4:29 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I have no idea if what you are reading is pre- or post-PnP, but the PnP will take precedence EVERY time. And the PnP states that there are no camps, the person who first attacks/aggro's the MOB is the rightful "owner" of that MOB.
▲ Page top
IT APPEARS IM IN TOTAL ERROR
QuoteReply
# May 25 2001 at 8:38 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I was unaware of the GM decision of "NO CAMPS" policy. This would make my KS statement all wrong. It would make it more of a "Very, Very, Very, Very long camp item". As to the item acquired by the ranger, I will be looking him up to apologize to him for my ERROR. This is still an item that is not worth camping in my opinion.

#Anonymous, Posted: May 20 2001 at 12:18 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) LOL
#Anonymous, Posted: May 13 2001 at 1:16 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Hey, If I ever saw Vexven I'd just pickpocket her and it wouldn't be killstealing. Just STEALING! You dumb asses would even know! hehehe......
RE: 1 Dirty Rogue
QuoteReply
# Aug 10 2001 at 7:50 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591764994717
10 posts
Was I the only one who didn't think this was a serious post? I felt like the response to this post was from people who took this a little too personal, concidering that an in-game rogue would probably concider such actions, dirty or not. it seemed to me as more of a joke to all the power lifting muscle headed characters of EQ, who after a hard fought battle found the treasure chest empty. I laugh at the idea of a stupified and bewildered "tank" wondering where his loot went,and that's the point! I'm not laughing at anyone, because it's an idea; a joke; a quip; nothing serious. Regardless of how it was meant to be translated, that's how I took it...and that makes all the difference...POINT OF VIEW. other people take things differnetly. No need to get bent outta shape over it. Laugh last, SpinHollower, you got quite the rise outta them.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 17 2001 at 8:39 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Did u post this actually thinking people would think you're cool? Don't be so proud of your actions - You'll find you'll end up losing a lot, and im talking about in real life...
#Anonymous, Posted: May 13 2001 at 1:20 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Yes I know it take's BALLS to pust a message like this with my characters Name and Server name! I dont care! Player's ***** at me all the time and I dont stop! LOL......heheh! Good luck on making me!
#Anonymous, Posted: May 16 2001 at 9:05 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Hope you get banned from the game. Thats just like KSing and people work hard for that shield. Its people like you who really make everquest suck.
RE: 1 Dirty Rogue
QuoteReply
# Jul 01 2001 at 7:26 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I wouldn't worry too much about that post. A rogue can't pickpocker a magic item, so it's fargin impossible to "steal" this. However if it was, your a dirty bastage to do it, IMO. Being a rogue I wouldn't even do it if i had the option.
▲ Page top
Anti KS character
QuoteReply
# May 12 2001 at 7:02 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
As a SK, my harm touch gives me a great advantage to stop an SK on a good drop - just wait till it's close enough that I can garantee the kill and one HT saves the item for myself or my group. So if you're camping a highly KS'd spawn, bring a SK if possible and emphasise to him his most important job of saving the kill from the KSers.
▲ Page top
RE: Anti KS character
QuoteReply
# May 16 2001 at 12:13 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Better yet if you really want to stop the KS bring a chanter and have him mez the KSer and finish killing the spawn then if your on vallon, tallon, or rallos kill him. This almost always works I've gotten CDS a few time and also got PGT a few times I think that they are easy to get so I just sell them and make the extra money. Good Luck.

Volte 17 paladin on Vallon Zek
▲ Page top
RE: Anti KS character
QuoteReply
# Oct 22 2001 at 7:46 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1710720965640
175 posts
That will only work on the PvP servers, not on regular PvE ones.
▲ Page top
KS Very Bad - Dont Waste Your Time
QuoteReply
# May 07 2001 at 8:57 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Had the ledge camped just two days ago for 4 hours with two other mid 20's level and we where holding our own. Noticed a 24 lvl ranger hanging around about 1/2 hour before Vexven spawned (we didnt know when his spawn was going to be but the KS'ing ranger did) and thought nothing of it. I was covering the whole ledge and going down on path scouting with one other of my group members to make sure we covered the whole area. Then Vexven spawned, the KS'ing ranger and one of my group members was on him. I came up on Vexven when he was about 10% damaged. Next thing you know the ranger was casting spells and Vexven was dead and KS ranger took shield. KS'ing ranger said he waited to attack. Yea, wanted us to take some of the damage and draw the attack so he could finish Named off with more spell damage. He would not Roll for it. Said he was camped for 12 hours waiting for it. I was there for 4 hours and only saw him for 1/2 hour before spawn. His story changed to that fact. Still would not roll. DONT waste your time on this because most everyone I've talked to has experienced KS on this item. Its to much a WASTE of ones life to have it stolen at the last moment. Their is no camping rights when it comes to the CDS so it seams to me. Love to have but would rather see it removed from the game if it brings out the worst in people. Petition - No, not yet. What proof do I have other than the three of us against his word. Would be a pissing match. Better to say, forget it and move on. BUT I WONT EVER FORGET HE PC NAME - EVER.
▲ Page top
ADDED INFO: KS Very Bad - Dont Waste Your Time
QuoteReply
# May 07 2001 at 10:13 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I figure I have somewhere in the mid 20's hours trying to get this thing. If I where to camp this again, assuming I take over when a group disbands their camp after spawn. I would have to wait another 6 hours with a minimum of 3 of us to hold the camp from the gnolls. Thus a 1/3 chance of winning the roll, this would put me at somewhere in the low 30's hours if I got lucky on first roll and mid 40's or higher if unlucky takeing out the KS'ing going on. Throw that in, and you are over 50 to 60 hours, if your lucky and higher if not. WHAT A WASTE OF LIFE.
▲ Page top
Light Source
QuoteReply
# Apr 27 2001 at 5:30 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
It is indeed a Major Lightsource. But, alas, it is bugged. If you enter water, the light effect is cancelled. You must unequip and then reequip to get the light back.

Caramoor
35 Paladin of Quellious
35 Mage of Vazelle
